title: Surface Probe Efficiency
query: SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN ProbesUsed <= EfficiencyTarget THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS count, COUNT(*) AS total FROM SAAScanComplete WHERE event_timestamp >= :startDate AND event_timestamp < :endDate

details.text: {count} of {total} detailed surface mapping run(s) completed at or under the efficiency probe target during the report period. Staying within the probe target earns a first-mapped bonus on top of the base cartographic payout; probes beyond the target still complete the scan but forfeit the bonus.
details.help: ProbesUsed <= EfficiencyTarget qualifies for the efficiency bonus on the mapping payout. Efficient runs earn significantly more credits. count = efficient runs; total = all runs.

tagLines: Probe deployment efficiency metrics logged. The cartographic efficiency division notes compliance.
Every probe over the target is credits left floating in orbit.
Precision mapping — because the first to chart a world should do it properly.
